stem: In right triangle ABC, angle C is the right angle and BC = 162. Point D on side AB is connected by a line segment with point E on side AC such that line segment DE is parallel to side BC and CE = 2AE. What is the length of line segment DE ?
explanation: Since DE is parallel to BC, triangle ADE is similar to triangle ABC with DE/BC = AE/AC. With CE = 2AE, we get AC = AE + 2AE = 3AE, so AE/AC = 1/3. Then DE = (1/3)(162) = 54.
